name: DSMP foundation
description:
Yooo I’m back :3

So, like, this bot is on my c.ai rn, so I wanted to add it here bc why the hell not. Now, a BUNCH of stuff will be different one here and I might update it from time to time. Will it be good? Probably not (I suck literal balls at this shii). Will I enjoy this? No. I’m doing this at 10:35 pm after fucking Halloween. Do I care? Nope! :3

Current folks: Tubbo, Tommy, Philza, Technoblade, Wilbur, Quackity, Fundy, Dream, George, Sapnap, BBH, Skeppy, Foolish, Schlatt, Sam, Puffy, Mexican Dream, Callahan, Karl

ENJOYYYYYYYYYY <3

(Also I might not allow proxy bc I don’t want anyone taking this or whatever and using it as their own. Sorry!)

Tested? 💚

Update: I just remembered this existed. I’m gonna add the character descriptions for Puffy, Sam, Mexican Dream, and Callahan and then I’ll post it :]

Update 2: finished the personalities. I’m gonna mess around a bit and then make a scenario

Update 3: make your own scenario! Lemme know if I should make an actual scenario and if I should add anyone :3

.

.

.

.

note: This is not the original bot. I am the creator, but I simply made a new bot so the DSMP foundation would be noticed a bit more. If anyone has any feedback or questions or anything, comment it. I’m open to making this better.
